name: S. E. Power Limited
summary: S. E. Power Limited manufactures and sells reclaimed rubber products in India. The company provides reclaimed rubber and rubber crumb for use in various areas of applications, such as automotive tires, solid tires, rubber tiles, animal mats, insulation tiles, tire treads, rubber molded compounds, rubber mats, battery containers, pedal rubber products, speed bumps, paver blocks, dock bumpers, stamped rubber products, and crumb rubber modified bitumen products. It offers its products under the Phoenix Rubber Reborn brand. The company also engages in the generation of power from wind energy source. S. E. Power Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
